docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
